use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Serving as call-to-action buttons in marketing pages
Navigation triggers for routing between pages
Initiating asynchronous operations like API calls
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built on Radix UI Slot and styled with Tailwind CSS using class-variance-authority. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with composition support via the asChild prop. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for any web application requiring interactive action triggers.
